description: Governance-aware architecture builder platform for proposing, generating, auditing, and promoting system changes.

object_types.label: Agent
object_types.description: A governed system actor with explicit role, authority, permissions, and lifecycle.

object_types.label: Proposal
object_types.description: A structured request to create, modify, remove, or govern a system element.

object_types.label: Patch
object_types.description: A staged implementation artifact derived from a proposal.

object_types.label: Snapshot
object_types.description: An immutable state record created after promotion.

object_types.label: Audit Finding
object_types.description: A structured risk, compliance, or architecture finding attached to a patch or promotion package.

object_types.label: Canon Rule
object_types.description: A governing rule that constrains or guides system behavior.

principles: Promotion to live requires human approval.
Hard canon is machine-readable and enforceable.
First-class agents must remain few and justified.
